commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer approval of the public API and persisted session semantics; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the PR adds no dependency, workflow, install hook, secret handling, or remote-download change. (sha=ce55933bd2accd01b8b10e9d781f4bdd36bccb0a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a saved ChatGPT browser follow-up CLI/MCP path, detached browser finalizer recovery, an `oracle-await` package bin, browser child-session lineage metadata, docs/runbook updates, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR rather than a reported current-main bug. The contributor supplied after-change real browser and built CLI terminal proof for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer approval of the public API and persisted session semantics; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: Add browser follow-up API and detached finalizer recovery
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a public follow-up API for continuing an existing saved ChatGPT browser conversation without mutating the parent Oracle session.

- Adds `oracle follow-up <parentSessionId> [prompt]` with `--prompt`, `--slug`, `--wait/--no-wait`, and `--no-recover`.
- Adds MCP tool `follow_up` returning `sessionId`, `parentSessionId`, `status`, and `logTail`.
- Creates child browser sessions linked with `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`, copying parent browser config while forcing follow-up runs out of Deep Research mode.
- Keeps follow-up v1 prompt-only and rejects new files/attachments with a clear error.
- Uses the detached runner/finalizer path for follow-up child sessions so browser work can survive client timeouts.

## Review Feedback Addressed

- Preserved existing MCP `consult` compatibility: local browser `consult` now blocks by default again.
- Added explicit MCP detached opt-in via `browserDetached:true` or `ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_DETACHED=1`.
- Exposed `oracle-await` as an npm package bin and included it in package `files`.
- Wired browser child sessions into status/session lineage using `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`.
- Added real browser proof for CLI follow-up, render recovery, `oracle-await`, and explicit detached MCP consult.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/cli/sessionDisplay.coverage.test.ts tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts`
  - 3 files, 22 tests passed
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm pack --dry-run`
  - build passed
  - package contents include `skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await`
- `pnpm exec vitest run`
  - 137 files passed, 18 skipped
  - 1093 tests passed, 42 skipped

## Redacted Real Browser Proof

Environment: local built checkout at this PR head (`35c66c32`), normal Oracle manual-login browser profile, no files/attachments, `--browser-archive never`, `--browser-keep-browser`.

Parent run:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js --engine browser --model gpt-5.2-instant --browser-model-strategy current --browser-archive never --browser-keep-browser --slug pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof parent. Reply with exactly: PARENT_READY" --timeout 10m
Session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Mode: browser foreground
Reattach: oracle session pr-proof-parent-0604
[browser] Acquired ChatGPT browser slot ...
Answer:
PARENT_READY

3m04s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 20 / output 3 / total 23
```

Parent immutability check, before and after follow-up attempts:

```text
690f96310ef4a32827d00d9d111dee78470c1592e5553502cb27cb195210e07e  meta.json
0959461543219978a35a20e02ffd63eef5dabd1c4d45832687154cd6e2925553  artifacts/transcript.md
```

CLI follow-up child session:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js follow-up pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY" --slug pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --wait
Follow-up session: pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Parent session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: pending
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: running
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: completed
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY

20.7s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 23 / output 5 / total 28
```

Child metadata/transcript proof:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-child-retry-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "parentSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "followUpOfSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "browserUrl": "https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9",
  "transcriptBytes": 220
}
```

```text
# Oracle Browser Transcript
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9

## Prompt
Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY

## Answer
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Status lineage proof:

```text
Recent Sessions
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/fg ... pr-proof-parent-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... ├─ pr-proof-child-retry-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... └─ pr-proof-child-0604
```

Render/reattach proof:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --render
Chain: pr-proof-parent-0604 -> pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Status: completed
Execution: br/bg (detached)
Artifacts:
- Browser transcript - /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md (220 B)
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

`oracle-await` proof:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-child-retry-0604 0 1 5
oracle-await: pr-proof-child-retry-0604 - first 0s, then every 1s, cap 5s
  [1s] status=completed transcript=220B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Additional finalizer recovery proof: an earlier child (`pr-proof-child-0604`) hit a transient ChatGPT-generated error response. The detached finalizer performed recovery render attempt 1 at 5m, captured a 327 B transcript, and finalized the child as `completed`.

## Redacted MCP Detached Proof

Default MCP `consult` behavior is blocking again. Explicit detached mode was also smoke-tested through mcporter:

```text
$ CHROME_DEVTOOLS_URL=http://127.0.0.1:0 ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_WAIT_MS=1000 pnpm dlx mcporter call oracle-local.consult ... browserDetached:true slug:pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 --config config/mcporter.json
{
  "sessionId": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "running",
  "output": "[mcp] Starting detached browser worker for pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604; client timeouts will not stop the run.\n[mcp] Waiting up to 1s for inline completion before returning session status.\n..."
}
```

Recovery:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 30 30 420
oracle-await: pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 - first 30s, then every 30s, cap 420s
  [30s] status=completed transcript=214B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

MCP_DETACHED_READY
```

MCP session metadata:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "mode": "browser",
  "detached": true,
  "transcriptBytes": 214,
  "answer": true
}
```

## Notes

Upstream already has `--browser-follow-up` for planned extra turns inside a fresh browser consult and API `--followup` for Responses API chaining. This PR covers a different path: sending a new prompt to an already saved/recoverable ChatGPT browser conversation as a separate child session.


## Current-head proof for ce55933b

Added after the June 4, 2026 ClawSweeper re-review. This is proof for the latest review fixes at PR head `ce55933b`.

```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
ce55933b
```

Follow-up children no longer inherit a blocking parent wait preference unless `--wait` is explicit:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts -t "does not inherit parent wait preference unless wait is explicit" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts > browser follow-up sessions > does not inherit parent wait preference unless wait is explicit 14ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 4 skipped (5)
```

Detached session finalizers are scoped to browser sessions, so detached API sessions do not launch the browser finalizer path:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli/detach.test.ts -t "only launches detached session finalizers for browser sessions" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/cli/detach.test.ts > shouldDetachSession > only launches detached session finalizers for browser sessions 1ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 4 skipped (5)
```

Resumed browser conversations still fail closed when no prior turns hydrate:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts -t "rejects resumed conversations with zero prior turns when required" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts > waitForResumedConversationHydration > rejects resumed conversations with zero prior turns when required 5ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 48 skipped (49)
```

The full targeted acceptance set and CI for `ce55933b` are also green:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts tests/cli/detach.test.ts tests/mcp/followUp.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/cli/sessionFinalizer.test.ts tests/cli/integrationCli.test.ts
Test Files  7 passed (7)
Tests  107 passed | 1 skipped (108)

$ pnpm run typecheck
> tsgo --noEmit

$ pnpm run format:check
All matched files use the correct format.
```


## Current-head built CLI/terminal proof for ce55933b

Added after the June 4, 2026 22:25 UTC ClawSweeper review asked for non-test current-head proof. This uses the built checkout (`pnpm run build`) at `ce55933b`; temp `ORACLE_HOME_DIR` paths and fake session ids are non-secret proof data.

```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
ce55933b

$ pnpm run build
> tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm run build:vendor
```

### Default detached follow-up from a blocking browser parent

A temp browser parent was created with `waitPreference:true` and a fake saved ChatGPT conversation URL. Running the built CLI follow-up without `--wait` returned a detached child session:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-proof.9x9LYw ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js follow-up ce55933-parent \
  --prompt "child proof prompt" --slug "ce55933 child default"

Follow-up session: ce55933-child-default
Parent session: ce55933-parent
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/ce55933-proof
Session: ce55933-child-default
Mode: browser background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-child-default
Reattach via: oracle session ce55933-child-default --render
```

Metadata confirms the child did not inherit the parent blocking wait preference while keeping parent linkage intact:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-proof.9x9LYw node --input-type=module -e '...read child/parent metadata...'
{
  "childSessionId": "ce55933-child-default",
  "childWaitPreference": false,
  "childDetached": true,
  "parentSessionId": "ce55933-parent",
  "followUpOfSessionId": "ce55933-parent",
  "parentWaitPreferenceStill": true
}
```

### Fail-closed empty resume path from built browser helper

This directly invokes the built browser hydration helper with zero hydrated prior turns and `requirePriorTurns:true`. It fails closed before a prompt can be submitted as a fresh chat:

```text
$ node --input-type=module -e '...waitForResumedConversationHydration(... requirePriorTurns: true) ...'
{
  "result": "failed-closed",
  "name": "BrowserAutomationError",
  "message": "Saved ChatGPT conversation did not load prior turns; refusing to submit follow-up as a fresh chat.",
  "details": {
    "stage": "resume-conversation",
    "priorTurns": 0
  },
  "logs": []
}
```

### Browser-only detached finalizer scoping

The built detach policy now starts detached finalizers only for browser sessions:

```text
$ node --input-type=module -e 'import { shouldLaunchDetachedSessionFinalizer } from "./dist/src/cli/detach.js"; ...'
{
  "api": false,
  "browser": true
}
```

A built CLI Pro API detached run with the repo mock client returned normally without a browser-finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok \
  ORACLE_CLIENT_FACTORY=tests/fixtures/mockClientFactory.cjs \
  ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proof \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js --provider openai --model gpt-5.5-pro \
  --prompt "api detach proof" --slug "ce55933 api detach ok"

Session: ce55933-api-detach-ok
Mode: api background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-api-detach-ok
Pro runs can take up to 60 minutes (usually 10-15). Add --wait to stay attached.
```

The temp API session log contains no browser finalizer line and no finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok node --input-type=module -e '...read output.log...'
{
  "hasFinalizerLog": false,
  "hasFinalizerWarning": false
}
```
target.author: pdurlej

A built CLI Pro API detached run with the repo mock client returned normally without a browser-finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok \
  ORACLE_CLIENT_FACTORY=tests/fixtures/mockClientFactory.cjs \
  ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proof \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js --provider openai --model gpt-5.5-pro \
  --prompt "api detach proof" --slug "ce55933 api detach ok"

Session: ce55933-api-detach-ok
Mode: api background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-api-detach-ok
Pro runs can take up to 60 minutes (usually 10-15). Add --wait to stay attached.
```

The temp API session log contains no browser finalizer line and no finalizer warning:


target.title: Add browser follow-up API and detached finalizer recovery
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a public follow-up API for continuing an existing saved ChatGPT browser conversation without mutating the parent Oracle session.

- Adds `oracle follow-up <parentSessionId> [prompt]` with `--prompt`, `--slug`, `--wait/--no-wait`, and `--no-recover`.
- Adds MCP tool `follow_up` returning `sessionId`, `parentSessionId`, `status`, and `logTail`.
- Creates child browser sessions linked with `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`, copying parent browser config while forcing follow-up runs out of Deep Research mode.
- Keeps follow-up v1 prompt-only and rejects new files/attachments with a clear error.
- Uses the detached runner/finalizer path for follow-up child sessions so browser work can survive client timeouts.

## Review Feedback Addressed

- Preserved existing MCP `consult` compatibility: local browser `consult` now blocks by default again.
- Added explicit MCP detached opt-in via `browserDetached:true` or `ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_DETACHED=1`.
- Exposed `oracle-await` as an npm package bin and included it in package `files`.
- Wired browser child sessions into status/session lineage using `parentSessionId` / `followUpOfSessionId`.
- Added real browser proof for CLI follow-up, render recovery, `oracle-await`, and explicit detached MCP consult.

## Validation

- `pnpm exec vitest run tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/cli/sessionDisplay.coverage.test.ts tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts`
  - 3 files, 22 tests passed
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm pack --dry-run`
  - build passed
  - package contents include `skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await`
- `pnpm exec vitest run`
  - 137 files passed, 18 skipped
  - 1093 tests passed, 42 skipped

## Redacted Real Browser Proof

Environment: local built checkout at this PR head (`35c66c32`), normal Oracle manual-login browser profile, no files/attachments, `--browser-archive never`, `--browser-keep-browser`.

Parent run:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js --engine browser --model gpt-5.2-instant --browser-model-strategy current --browser-archive never --browser-keep-browser --slug pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof parent. Reply with exactly: PARENT_READY" --timeout 10m
Session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Mode: browser foreground
Reattach: oracle session pr-proof-parent-0604
[browser] Acquired ChatGPT browser slot ...
Answer:
PARENT_READY

3m04s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 20 / output 3 / total 23
```

Parent immutability check, before and after follow-up attempts:

```text
690f96310ef4a32827d00d9d111dee78470c1592e5553502cb27cb195210e07e  meta.json
0959461543219978a35a20e02ffd63eef5dabd1c4d45832687154cd6e2925553  artifacts/transcript.md
```

CLI follow-up child session:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js follow-up pr-proof-parent-0604 --prompt "Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY" --slug pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --wait
Follow-up session: pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Parent session: pr-proof-parent-0604
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: pending
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: running
[follow-up] Session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 status: completed
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY

20.7s - gpt-5.2-instant[browser] - input 23 / output 5 / total 28
```

Child metadata/transcript proof:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-child-retry-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "parentSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "followUpOfSessionId": "pr-proof-parent-0604",
  "browserUrl": "https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9",
  "transcriptBytes": 220
}
```

```text
# Oracle Browser Transcript
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/6a21...63f9

## Prompt
Oracle PR live proof follow-up retry. Reply with exactly: CHILD_READY_RETRY

## Answer
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Status lineage proof:

```text
Recent Sessions
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/fg ... pr-proof-parent-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... ├─ pr-proof-child-retry-0604
completed gpt-5.2-instant br/bg ... └─ pr-proof-child-0604
```

Render/reattach proof:

```text
$ node dist/scripts/run-cli.js session pr-proof-child-retry-0604 --render
Chain: pr-proof-parent-0604 -> pr-proof-child-retry-0604
Status: completed
Execution: br/bg (detached)
Artifacts:
- Browser transcript - /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md (220 B)
Answer:
CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

`oracle-await` proof:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-child-retry-0604 0 1 5
oracle-await: pr-proof-child-retry-0604 - first 0s, then every 1s, cap 5s
  [1s] status=completed transcript=220B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-child-retry-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

CHILD_READY_RETRY
```

Additional finalizer recovery proof: an earlier child (`pr-proof-child-0604`) hit a transient ChatGPT-generated error response. The detached finalizer performed recovery render attempt 1 at 5m, captured a 327 B transcript, and finalized the child as `completed`.

## Redacted MCP Detached Proof

Default MCP `consult` behavior is blocking again. Explicit detached mode was also smoke-tested through mcporter:

```text
$ CHROME_DEVTOOLS_URL=http://127.0.0.1:0 ORACLE_MCP_BROWSER_WAIT_MS=1000 pnpm dlx mcporter call oracle-local.consult ... browserDetached:true slug:pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 --config config/mcporter.json
{
  "sessionId": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "running",
  "output": "[mcp] Starting detached browser worker for pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604; client timeouts will not stop the run.\n[mcp] Waiting up to 1s for inline completion before returning session status.\n..."
}
```

Recovery:

```text
$ skills/oracle/scripts/oracle-await pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 30 30 420
oracle-await: pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604 - first 30s, then every 30s, cap 420s
  [30s] status=completed transcript=214B
READY /Users/pd/.oracle/sessions/pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604/artifacts/transcript.md
----- answer -----
## Answer

MCP_DETACHED_READY
```

MCP session metadata:

```json
{
  "id": "pr-proof-mcp-detached-0604",
  "status": "completed",
  "mode": "browser",
  "detached": true,
  "transcriptBytes": 214,
  "answer": true
}
```

## Notes

Upstream already has `--browser-follow-up` for planned extra turns inside a fresh browser consult and API `--followup` for Responses API chaining. This PR covers a different path: sending a new prompt to an already saved/recoverable ChatGPT browser conversation as a separate child session.


## Current-head proof for ce55933b

Added after the June 4, 2026 ClawSweeper re-review. This is proof for the latest review fixes at PR head `ce55933b`.

```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
ce55933b
```

Follow-up children no longer inherit a blocking parent wait preference unless `--wait` is explicit:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts -t "does not inherit parent wait preference unless wait is explicit" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts > browser follow-up sessions > does not inherit parent wait preference unless wait is explicit 14ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 4 skipped (5)
```

Detached session finalizers are scoped to browser sessions, so detached API sessions do not launch the browser finalizer path:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/cli/detach.test.ts -t "only launches detached session finalizers for browser sessions" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/cli/detach.test.ts > shouldDetachSession > only launches detached session finalizers for browser sessions 1ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 4 skipped (5)
```

Resumed browser conversations still fail closed when no prior turns hydrate:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts -t "rejects resumed conversations with zero prior turns when required" --reporter verbose

RUN  v4.1.7 /Users/pd/Developer/oracle-workbench/worktrees/official-main

✓ tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts > waitForResumedConversationHydration > rejects resumed conversations with zero prior turns when required 5ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  1 passed | 48 skipped (49)
```

The full targeted acceptance set and CI for `ce55933b` are also green:

```text
$ pnpm exec vitest run tests/browser/pageActions.test.ts tests/cli/browserFollowUp.test.ts tests/cli/detach.test.ts tests/mcp/followUp.test.ts tests/mcp/consult.test.ts tests/cli/sessionFinalizer.test.ts tests/cli/integrationCli.test.ts
Test Files  7 passed (7)
Tests  107 passed | 1 skipped (108)

$ pnpm run typecheck
> tsgo --noEmit

$ pnpm run format:check
All matched files use the correct format.
```


## Current-head built CLI/terminal proof for ce55933b

Added after the June 4, 2026 22:25 UTC ClawSweeper review asked for non-test current-head proof. This uses the built checkout (`pnpm run build`) at `ce55933b`; temp `ORACLE_HOME_DIR` paths and fake session ids are non-secret proof data.

```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
ce55933b

$ pnpm run build
> tsgo -p tsconfig.build.json && pnpm run build:vendor
```

### Default detached follow-up from a blocking browser parent

A temp browser parent was created with `waitPreference:true` and a fake saved ChatGPT conversation URL. Running the built CLI follow-up without `--wait` returned a detached child session:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-proof.9x9LYw ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js follow-up ce55933-parent \
  --prompt "child proof prompt" --slug "ce55933 child default"

Follow-up session: ce55933-child-default
Parent session: ce55933-parent
Conversation: https://chatgpt.com/c/ce55933-proof
Session: ce55933-child-default
Mode: browser background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-child-default
Reattach via: oracle session ce55933-child-default --render
```

Metadata confirms the child did not inherit the parent blocking wait preference while keeping parent linkage intact:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-proof.9x9LYw node --input-type=module -e '...read child/parent metadata...'
{
  "childSessionId": "ce55933-child-default",
  "childWaitPreference": false,
  "childDetached": true,
  "parentSessionId": "ce55933-parent",
  "followUpOfSessionId": "ce55933-parent",
  "parentWaitPreferenceStill": true
}
```

### Fail-closed empty resume path from built browser helper

This directly invokes the built browser hydration helper with zero hydrated prior turns and `requirePriorTurns:true`. It fails closed before a prompt can be submitted as a fresh chat:

```text
$ node --input-type=module -e '...waitForResumedConversationHydration(... requirePriorTurns: true) ...'
{
  "result": "failed-closed",
  "name": "BrowserAutomationError",
  "message": "Saved ChatGPT conversation did not load prior turns; refusing to submit follow-up as a fresh chat.",
  "details": {
    "stage": "resume-conversation",
    "priorTurns": 0
  },
  "logs": []
}
```

### Browser-only detached finalizer scoping

The built detach policy now starts detached finalizers only for browser sessions:

```text
$ node --input-type=module -e 'import { shouldLaunchDetachedSessionFinalizer } from "./dist/src/cli/detach.js"; ...'
{
  "api": false,
  "browser": true
}
```

A built CLI Pro API detached run with the repo mock client returned normally without a browser-finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok \
  ORACLE_CLIENT_FACTORY=tests/fixtures/mockClientFactory.cjs \
  ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proof \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js --provider openai --model gpt-5.5-pro \
  --prompt "api detach proof" --slug "ce55933 api detach ok"

Session: ce55933-api-detach-ok
Mode: api background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-api-detach-ok
Pro runs can take up to 60 minutes (usually 10-15). Add --wait to stay attached.
```

The temp API session log contains no browser finalizer line and no finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok node --input-type=module -e '...read output.log...'
{
  "hasFinalizerLog": false,
  "hasFinalizerWarning": false
}
```

```text
$ node --input-type=module -e 'import { shouldLaunchDetachedSessionFinalizer } from "./dist/src/cli/detach.js"; ...'
{
  "api": false,
  "browser": true
}
```

A built CLI Pro API detached run with the repo mock client returned normally without a browser-finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok \
  ORACLE_CLIENT_FACTORY=tests/fixtures/mockClientFactory.cjs \
  ORACLE_DISABLE_KEYTAR=1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proof \
  node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js --provider openai --model gpt-5.5-pro \
  --prompt "api detach proof" --slug "ce55933 api detach ok"

Session: ce55933-api-detach-ok
Mode: api background
Models: 1
Detach: yes, polling
Reattach: oracle session ce55933-api-detach-ok
Pro runs can take up to 60 minutes (usually 10-15). Add --wait to stay attached.
```

The temp API session log contains no browser finalizer line and no finalizer warning:

```text
$ ORACLE_HOME_DIR=/private/tmp/oracle-ce55933-api-proof-ok node --input-type=module -e '...read output.log...'
{
  "hasFinalizerLog": false,
  "hasFinalizerWarning": false
}
```
